Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 1 4}We're doing this! Show me what you've got![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 1 8}I know you don't want to fight... But we can't back down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 6}Aigis... I'll provide support. It doesn't seem like we can talk them out of this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 1 4}I won't go down... No more holding back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 5 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 9 1 8}Okay, I need to get serious... I'm stronger than this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 1 8}I don't care how hard it gets... I'll never give up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 11 1 4}You did good, Amada... Just leave the rest to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 12 1 8}Sanada-san... It's okay, you can rest. I'll take care of this![n]{f 1 1}
